properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I stand before Your throne Dressed in glory not my own What a joy I'll sing of on that day No more tears or broken dreams Forgotten is the minor key Everything as it was meant to be

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And we will worship, worship Forever in Your presence we will sing We will worship, worship You An endless hallelujah to the King

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I will see You as You are Love You with unsinning heart And see how much You paid to bring me home Not till then, Lord, shall I know Not till then, how much I owe Everything I am before Your throne

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: No more tears, no more shame No more sin and sorrow ever known again No more fears, no more pain We will see You face to face See You face to face

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And we will worship, worship Forever in Your presence we will sing (sing) We will worship, worship You An endless hallelujah to the King

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And we will worship, worship Forever in Your presence we will sing, we will sing We will worship, worship You An endless hallelujah to the King

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: An endless hallelujah to the King We'll sing An endless hallelujah to the King

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Sing an endless hallelujah To you Forever and ever And ever and ever Saints and Angels, living creatures All the hosts of Heaven Hallelujah, hallelujah To you
